projection_block: PROJECTION-CI CONSOLIDATOR ARMED + VALIDATED (self-test PASS); awaiting land #71's measured tuple (E_T, branch_hit, spread_lambda, width_mu, step, ppl, boots, completed). The instant his readout lands, ONE call emits the human-readable GO/NO-GO with its CI, its P(clear 500), its named binding leg, and its validity stamp -- the verbatim projection block of the `Approval request: HF job` issue.

wirbel_146_sampling.note: hi (tau_high=1.0) + E[T] CI bit-match exactly; lo carries the SAME tree-class tau-floor correction PR #155 applied to #142 (#146 imports gate.TAU) -> ~0.6% down, no verdict flip.

uncertainty_model.sampling_source: wirbel #146 bootstrap E[T] CI / descending-regime sigma (tau-invariant)
uncertainty_model.calibration_source: ubel #148 one-sided downward band (0.787%; tree-class tau folded in)
uncertainty_model.decision_geometry_source: fern #149 joint (spread x width) frontier green membership

land_tuple_spec.E_T: MEASURED accept-length E[T] (numerator) -- the SAME number #142/#146 consume
land_tuple_spec.branch_hit: measured rank-2 conditional branch-hit rho2 (~0.4165; land's local gate)
land_tuple_spec.spread_lambda: deep-spine-spread recovery fraction lambda in [0,1] (#149 axis; or derive from the per-depth conditional ladder q[2:] via #149 derive_lambda_mu_from_ladder)
land_tuple_spec.width_mu: branch-width recovery fraction mu in [0,1] (#149 axis; = branch_hit/rho2 clamped)
land_tuple_spec.step: lawine #136 MEASURED depth-9 decode step (s); default 1.2182
land_tuple_spec._note: NO new measurement is required beyond what #142 / #146 / #150 already consume -- the consolidator ASSEMBLES, it does not add a measurement requirement.

provenance: consolidates fern #142 (point gate + #155 tau-low fix), wirbel #146 (sampling CI / required-N), ubel #148 (K_cal tree-transfer band), fern #149 (joint spread x width frontier), denken #150 (validity). One source of truth per constant -- imports, does not re-derive. K_cal=125.268; clear-500 bar E[T]=4.862 (measured step 1.2182).
method: LOCAL CPU-only analytic synthesis + a #142 tau-floor bug-fix; no GPU/vLLM/HF Job/submission/kernel build. Produces the Approval-request PROJECTION BLOCK only; does NOT authorize a launch. Greedy identity untouched.
